notes: Signal and control ports confirmed across multiple sources (Markertek, ManualsLib VS-84H2 user manual, Ivojo, Conference Table Boxes). Audio is handled entirely via HDMI embedded audio and ARC — no discrete analog or optical audio connectors. Power connector type (IEC C14) is inferred: the manual references a detachable power cord and universal 100-240V AC input, which is consistent with Kramer's standard 1U rack units; exact inlet designation not explicitly stated in any source consulted. The PROG port is labeled "mini USB" in all sources — mapped to usb-micro (closest match in controlled list). RS-232 is a 3-pin terminal block, mapped to euroblock.

ports.name: RS-232
ports.note: 3-pin terminal block for serial control from PC or control system

ports.name: PROG
ports.note: Mini USB port for firmware upgrade and PC/controller communication

ports.name: USB
ports.note: 5V/2A USB Type-A port for powering an external device

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Universal 100-240V AC 50/60Hz inlet; IEC C14 type inferred from detachable power cord reference in manual — exact inlet type not explicitly stated in available documentation
